body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** **Reproducible in staging?:** Needs Reproduction (Unable to reproduce) **Reproducible in production?:** Needs Reproduction **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** **Logs:** https://stackoverflow.com/c/expensify/questions/4856 **Expensify/Expensify Issue URL:** **Issue reported by:** @aimane-chnaif **Slack conversation** (hyperlinked to channel name): [#Convert](https://expensify.slack.com/archives/C07HPDRELLD/p1775064451710439) ## Action Performed: Precondition: Have a new workspace with Expensify cards feature enabled. 1. Go to workspace chat 2. Create a draft expense 3. Long press on the report preview and copy link 4. Paste link somewhere (i.e. in self DM) 5. Issue an Expensify virtual card to yourself 6. Go to the chat where link is pasted (i.e. self DM) 7. Tap the link ## Expected Result: There's a system message indicating that the Expensify card was assigned to you. ## Actual Result: The system message doesn't appear when there is a draft expense report. After deleting the expense report, the message appears. ## Workaround: Can the user still use Expensify without this being fixed? Have you informed them of the workaround? ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/329ce69d-0399-40c7-860d-8dd30330b008 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

Go to https://staging.new.expensify.com/ 2. Log in as a workspace employee 3. Go to the workspace chat 4. Go to the expense details 5. Edit the amount so it's higher than the scanned account 6. Submit the scan expense ## Expected Result: RBR is not displayed in the LHN but it does display in the expense page when the report is in the Outstanding state (submitted). ## Actual Result: RBR is displayed in the LHN if a "higher amount" violation is present. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: Select the officially supported platforms where the issue was reproduced: - [x] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [x] Windows: Chrome - [x] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/7c7bc648-363d-4599-8e11-6e0ee6507b11 [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)

body:
If you haven’t already, check out our [contributing guidelines](https://github.com/Expensify/ReactNativeChat/blob/main/contributingGuides/CONTRIBUTING.md) for onboarding and email contributors@expensify.com to request to join our Slack channel! ___ **Version Number:** 9.3.51-5 **Reproducible in staging?:** Yes **Reproducible in production?:** Yes **If this was caught during regression testing, add the test name, ID and link from BrowserStack:** https://github.com/Expensify/App/pull/86719 step 2 in Re-fetch triggers **Email or phone of affected tester (no customers):** N/A **Issue reported by:** Applause Internal Team **Bug source:** Pull Request QA execution **Device used:** iPhone 15 iOS 26.3.1 **App Component:** Other ## Action Performed: 1. Sign in to ND as User A on the main testing device, and User B on secondary device 2. As User A, create a workspace, add User B as a member 3. As User B, navigate to the workspace chat 4. Create a manual expense, open expense details, click Submit button 5. Send three messages in the expense details 6. Right click on the 3rd message - Copy link - send the link in 1:1 chat with User A 7. As User A, open 1:1 chat with User B, tap the link from step 6 ## Expected Result: The linked message is scrolled to ## Actual Result: User is navigated to the expense details, but the message is not scrolled to (happens, when navigating for the first time). "Submitted" system message does not appear in the expense details thread when navigating via another message link. ## Workaround: Unknown ## Platforms: - [ ] Android: App - [ ] Android: mWeb Chrome - [x] iOS: App - [ ] iOS: mWeb Safari - [ ] iOS: mWeb Chrome - [ ] Windows: Chrome - [ ] MacOS: Chrome / Safari ## Screenshots/Videos https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/3aab7f41-3589-4a66-8c72-ac2268f0226a [View all open jobs on GitHub](https://github.com/Expensify/App/issues?q=is%3Aopen+is%3Aissue+label%3A%22Help+Wanted%22)
